explanations.1: This checks if Apache's rewrite module is available before running any rewrite rules, so the server won't error if the module isn't installed.
explanations.7: This condition checks the HTTPS variable; !=on means 'is not equal to on', so it's true when the connection is not secure.
explanations.8: The [L,R=301] means stop processing rules after this one (L) and send a permanent redirect response (301) to the browser.
explanations.12: The !^ means 'does not start with', so this condition is true when the domain doesn't start with 'www.'.
